Herold

Tabard SPA not yet installed. Pick one:

  • Run scripts/install-tabard.sh to download the latest tabard release tarball into ./data/tabard and set [server.tabard].asset_dir = "./data/tabard" in system.toml (the quickstart template already does this).
  • Run scripts/embed-tabard.sh against a tabard checkout to bake the assets into the binary at build time.
  • Set [server.tabard].asset_dir to any directory holding a tabard dist/ tree.
